## Common Search Patterns
TL;DR: Typical user queries and where to find them.
- "Best USDC yields" → https://www.defi.garden/?token=USDC
- "USDC yields on Base" → https://www.defi.garden/?token=USDC&chain=Base
- "Ethereum lending" → https://www.defi.garden/?chain=Ethereum&poolTypes=Lending
- "Pendle opportunities" → https://www.defi.garden/?search=Pendle
- "High APY staking" → https://www.defi.garden/?poolTypes=Staking&minApy=10
- "Safe lending USDT" → https://www.defi.garden/?token=USDT&poolTypes=Lending
- "Arbitrum LP tokens" → https://www.defi.garden/?chain=Arbitrum&poolTypes=LP%2FDEX
- "High TVL pools" → https://www.defi.garden/?minTvl=10000000
